landing.subtitle: Track properties, tenants, and payments in one place. Stop chasing rent in spreadsheets — RentFlow keeps everything organized.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage rent
landing.feature1Desc: Add all your buildings and track occupancy across each unit. Never lose sight of vacancies.
landing.feature2Desc: Keep tenant contact details, unit assignments, and rent amounts in one organized place.
landing.feature3Desc: Record payments, flag overdue rent, and see your monthly revenue at a glance — in FCFA.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is a summary of your properties and rentals today.
dashboard.chartsDesc: Detailed financial analysis will appear here.
